data.title: Crypto fear & greed index plunges to 6-month low
data.description:
Investor confidence in crypto has fallen to its lowest level in nearly six months following Trump's announcement of 100% tariffs on China.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-fear-greed-index-plunges/

data.title: BTC Options Market Shows Distinct Gamma Structure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Murphy has analyzed the current structure of the BTC options market, revealing a distinct Gamma configuration characterized by a predominance of Call buying at higher levels and Put selling at lower levels. This creates a typical 'short on top, long on bottom' Gamma structure.

When the price is within the dense Call buying range of $113,000 to $125,000, market makers find themselves in a short Gamma zone. In this scenario, price increases necessitate passive spot buying for hedging, which can amplify upward movements. Conversely, price declines require passive selling, potentially accelerating downward trends. This range is identified as a 'volatility amplification zone,' where market makers' hedging needs are most sensitive, leading to stronger passive buying and selling feedback.

If the price falls below $106,000, market makers enter a long Gamma zone. Here, during price declines, market makers buy spot for hedging, providing a buffer and support in the lower region, known as the 'Gamma support zone.' When prices enter this long Gamma range, market makers' hedging behavior shifts to 'buying on dips,' offering natural support and absorbing lower volatility, leading to a tendency for prices to stabilize. This analysis is intended for educational purposes and should not be considered investment advice.

data.title: A whale's ZEC long position lost $1.27 million, and its PUMP long position was liquidated for $4.92 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, despite the rise in ZEC prices, a certain whale (0 xcf 9...5 c 0 e) still lost $1.27 million in ZEC long positions opened yesterday, and its PUMP long positions were also liquidated, resulting in a loss of $4.92 million.

data.title: Four traders were liquidated on Hyperliquid, with a total loss of $64.57 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain, four traders were completely liquidated on Hyperliquid during the market downturn, each losing over $10 million. Trader (0x1a67...4055) lost $18.73 million; trader (0x1d52...4397) lost $16.43 million; trader (0x0a07...1801) lost $15.69 million; and trader (0xb2ca...9c63) lost $13.72 million.

data.title: The whale that shorted BTC multiple times turned losses into profits, making a profit of $26.52 million in the past 24 hours
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale that previously suffered a $21.31 million loss from shorting BTC has now profited $26.52 million in the past 24 hours. The whale has now taken profits on nearly 40% of its short position, still holding a short position of 1,300 BTC, worth $144 million.

data.title: DWF Labs Co-founder: Will provide capital injection, investment, loans or token buybacks to projects affected by the flash crash
data.description: DWF Labs co-founder Andrei Grachev posted on the X platform that if any projects or businesses are affected by the recent flash crash, DWF Labs will provide capital injections, investments, loans, or token buybacks to help them recover and develop quickly.

data.title: ZEC (Zcash) rose against the trend and briefly broke through 270 USDT
data.description: Market data shows that ZEC (Zcash) briefly broke through 270 USDT and is currently trading at 269.6 USDT, a 24-hour increase of 13.81%.

data.title: Multiple addresses bought the bottom of PEPE, HYPE and other tokens after the market fell.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, several addresses saw significant on-chain activity following the market decline: 1. qianbaidu.eth (0x831...bB42) withdrew 657.8 billion PEPE (approximately $4.44 million) from Binance and deposited 8.67 million USDC into Hyperliquid to purchase HYPE. The address also purchased 140,145 HYPE (approximately $5.5 million) and went long on both BTC and HYPE. 2. A whale (0x2bf...a17e) spent 4.97 million USDT to purchase 600.88 billion PEPE.

data.title: Bitcoin wobbles at $110K as trader says $20B liquidation rout not 'bottom'
data.description:
Bitcoin stayed near three-week lows after a giant $20 billion liquidation cascade, but crypto market predictions warned that the bottom was not yet in.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-wobbles-110k-trader-says-20b-liquidation-rout-not-bottom?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttt%3D1760174152569%26cb%3Dbpmoqv%26ttl%3D0%26_dc%3D1760174152569&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Securitize in Talks for Potential SPAC Merger Valued Over $1 Billion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Securitize, a tokenization platform backed by BlackRock, is in discussions with a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) initiated by Cantor Fitzgerald LP regarding a potential public listing. Sources familiar with the matter indicate that the merger with Cantor Equity Partners II Inc. could value Securitize at over $1 billion. However, negotiations are still ongoing, and Securitize may opt to remain private.

data.title: Quantum Computing Poses Significant Risk to Bitcoin Security, Study Finds
data.description: According to PANews, a report by Deloitte reveals that approximately 25% of Bitcoin could be vulnerable to quantum attacks. If these Bitcoins are not transferred to quantum-resistant addresses in time, the advent of powerful quantum computers could result in losses amounting to hundreds of billions or even trillions of dollars. Charles Edwards, founder of digital asset management firm Capriole Investment and a long-time Bitcoin advocate, emphasized that the threat posed by quantum computing is more imminent than commonly perceived. He urged the community to establish a defense system by 2026. Edwards also questioned whether some investors are downplaying the threat to maintain optimistic expectations and warned that a delay in the quantum technology race could render Bitcoin worthless.

data.title: TRON Network Sees Significant Stablecoin Inflow
data.description: According to PANews, data from Cointelegraph reveals that in the past 24 hours, the TRON network experienced a stablecoin inflow of $1.1 billion. In contrast, the PLASMA network saw a stablecoin outflow amounting to $996 million.

data.title: Creditlink (CDL) is now available on Binance Alpha. The airdrop threshold is 200 Alpha Points.
data.description: Creditlink (CDL) is now available on Binance Alpha. Users with at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim a token airdrop. Claim 640 CDL tokens on the Alpha event page. The point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until all rewards are distributed. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, the airdrop will be forfeited. Additionally, Binance will launch a CDL trading competition with a total prize pool of 5,643,000 CDL.

data.title: Jack Dorsey Pushes Tax Exemptions for BTC Payments Under $300 — Could SHIB Benefit?
data.description:
Jack Dorsey is pushing for a de minimis tax exemption on small Bitcoin transactions to make the cryptocurrency practical for everyday purchases, while Senator Cynthia Lummis is supporting similar legislation. Currently, all BTC transactions are subject to capital gains tax, limiting its use for routine payments. If implemented, the move could boost everyday crypto adoption and encourage wider use of digital assets in commerce. The post Jack Dorsey Pushes Tax Exemptions for BTC Payments Under $300 — Could SHIB Benefit? first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/10/11/jack-dorsey-pushes-tax-exemptions-for-btc-payments-under-300-could-shib-benefit/

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based YB pre-market contracts with a leverage range of 1-25 times
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched pre-market contracts for YB, a U-margined contract with leverage ranging from 1 to 25x. Users can trade through the official website or the Bitget app.

data.title: CZ retweeted a tweet suggesting a potential dip
data.description: CZ retweeted a tweet from weRate co-founder Quinten on X, which said: "During the COVID-19 crash, $1.2 billion was liquidated; when FTX crashed, the scale of liquidated funds reached $1.6 billion; today's liquidated funds are $19.31 billion. People always hope to have bought during the COVID-19 crash, and this is the current COVID-19 crash."

data.title: Wintermute founder responds to rumors of bankruptcy: Everything is normal, sorry to disappoint you
data.description: Wintermute founder and CEO Evgeny Gaevoy responded to the rumors of bankruptcy on X, saying: "I'm sorry to disappoint you, but everything is normal at Wintermute and business is running as usual."

data.title: Galaxy Digital Secures $460M to Build Massive AI Hub in Texas
data.description:
Galaxy Digital has raised $460 million from a major global asset manager to convert its former Texas bitcoin mine into a massive AI-focused data center.

The post Galaxy Digital Secures $460M to Build Massive AI Hub in Texas first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/11/galaxy-digital-secures-460-m-ai-hub/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=galaxy-digital-secures-460-m-ai-hub

data.title: Uniswap founder: The platform's trading volume today is nearly $9 billion with no stress or downtime
data.description: Uniswap founder Hayden Adams wrote on X, “The massive sell-off is a good reminder of how DeFi is different. Uniswap’s trading volume today is close to $9 billion, well above normal levels, and the platform has not experienced any pressure or downtime.”
